rows.label: qev092205_MSG0001
rows.name:
Himeri listens sympathetically no matter
what you talk about[ST:wide ]— So I just end up
relying on her without thinking[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092205_MSG0002
rows.name:
Since we're both BLADEs, I think I
shouldn't become a burden, but...[ST:wait ]
